# `financial` — financial templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry / Financial Services  ·  **Templates:** 2

Phishing templates targeting financial transactions and banking

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Federal Reserve Wire Transfer Alert | [`wire_transfer.html`](wire_transfer.html) | credential_harvest | advanced | 20-40% |
| Skype Credit/Payment Notice | [`skype_payment.html`](skype_payment.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 30-50% |

## Template details

### Federal Reserve Wire Transfer Alert

- **File:** [`wire_transfer.html`](wire_transfer.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 20-40%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/financial_education.html`](education/financial_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - URGENT: Wire transfer requires immediate authorization
  - Federal Reserve: Transaction review required
  - Action Required: Outbound wire transfer pending approval
- **Operator notes:** Best for finance, accounting, and executive staff. Advanced difficulty — lower click rate but high-value target for BEC scenarios.

### Skype Credit/Payment Notice

- **File:** [`skype_payment.html`](skype_payment.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/financial_education.html`](education/financial_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Skype: Payment required to continue service
  - Your Skype subscription is expiring — update payment
  - Skype Credit: Auto-recharge payment failed
- **Operator notes:** Niche lure best suited to organizations still using Skype or Skype for Business. The expiring-subscription pretext applies moderate pressure. Consider a Teams-based template instead in fully migrated Microsoft 365 environments.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
